# ✅ AT3 Major Project — Self‑Audit Checklist  
Use this issue to confirm that your AT3 submission is complete and ready for GitHub Classroom + Google Classroom.

Tick **every box** before submitting.

---

## 📁 1. Repository Structure

- [ ] All required folders exist (`src/`, `docs/`, `docs/modelling/`, `deliverables/`)
- [ ] No template files remain
- [ ] All files renamed correctly
- [ ] All diagrams render on GitHub
- [ ] README is complete and accurate

---

## 🧩 2. Modelling Tools (All Required)

All must be inside `deliverables/modelling/`.

- [ ] Class Diagram  
- [ ] Use Case Diagram  
- [ ] System Flow Diagram  
- [ ] Data Dictionary  
- [ ] User Stories  
- [ ] Decision Tree  
- [ ] Context Diagram (Level 0 DFD)  
- [ ] Level 1 DFD  
- [ ] Structure Chart  
- [ ] Storyboard  

---

## 📚 3. Documentation Deliverables

All must be inside `deliverables/documentation/`.

- [ ] Project Proposal  
- [ ] User Stories (final)  
- [ ] Requirements summary  
- [ ] All modelling tools  
- [ ] Testing Log  
- [ ] Reflection / Evaluation  
- [ ] Bibliography / References  
- [ ] Final compiled documentation PDF  

---

## 💻 4. Implementation Deliverables

All must be inside `deliverables/implementation/`.

- [ ] Fully working program  
- [ ] All source code in `src/`  
- [ ] README with run instructions  
- [ ] Screenshots of running system  
- [ ] Evidence of testing  
- [ ] Version control history shows regular commits  

---

## 🧪 5. Testing Deliverables

- [ ] Completed Testing Log  
- [ ] Evidence of testing included  
- [ ] Major features tested  
- [ ] Edge cases tested  
- [ ] Screenshots included  

---

## 🎤 6. Presentation Deliverables

All must be inside `deliverables/presentation/`.

- [ ] Presentation slides  
- [ ] Slides exported as PDF (if required)  
- [ ] Screenshots or demo images included  

---

## 📦 7. Deliverables Folder (Final Packaging)

- [ ] modelling/  
- [ ] documentation/  
- [ ] implementation/  
- [ ] presentation/  
- [ ] final compiled documentation PDF  
- [ ] screenshots  
- [ ] required data files (JSON, SQL, CSV, etc.)  

---

## 🚀 8. Submission Requirements

### GitHub Classroom
- [ ] Final commit pushed  
- [ ] Repo renders correctly  
- [ ] All diagrams render  
- [ ] No template files remain  

### Google Classroom
- [ ] ZIP file submitted  
- [ ] PDF submitted  
- [ ] Presentation slides submitted  

---

## 🔍 9. Final Self‑Audit

- [ ] Everything renders correctly  
- [ ] All diagrams correct  
- [ ] All files renamed  
- [ ] No template files  
- [ ] Deliverables folder complete  
- [ ] Program runs  
- [ ] PDF complete  
- [ ] ZIP complete  
- [ ] GitHub repo clean  

---

## 📝 Notes (optional)

Add any final comments or questions here:
